metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_983
metadata.comment:
Rationale: DLC antibody co-localizes with PSD-95 and F-actin at excitatory synapses in cultured hippocampal neurons (Fig. 5). Quantitative immunogold EM localization of DLC in the PSD and dendritic spine (Fig. 6A-H). Enrichment of DLC in PSD fractions (Fig. 6I). Colocalization of DLC with GKAP and PSD-95 by immunoEM (Fig. 7).

The antibodies used in this study can not distinguish between DLC1 and DLC2 (98% similarity between these proteins)

3/11/2017 Pim
- Based on the localization to the postsynapse of Venus-tagged Dlc2 the EM data with the antibody that does not distinguish between DLC1 and DLC2 I think this data on PSD localization can be transferred to the DLC2 protein.. Experimental description: From M&M:
Hippocampal neuronal cultures prepared from 18 day embryonic rats
Pull-down experiments were done with whole rat brain homogenate
Immunoprecipitations were done from rat forebrain synaptosomes (P2 fraction)
For EM immunocytochemistry, male Sprague Dawley rats (225-375 gm; Charles River, Raleigh, NC) were anesthetized
